name: Quanergy Systems, Inc.
description: Quanergy Systems, Inc. is a technology company that specializes in the design, development, and production of light detection and ranging (LiDAR) sensors and 3D sensing solutions. The company provides intelligent, real-time 3D object detection, tracking, and classification systems for various industries, including physical security, industrial automation, and smart spaces. By leveraging solid-state LiDAR technology, Quanergy aims to enhance safety and operational efficiency through advanced automation processes. Headquartered in Sunnyvale, California, the company focuses on delivering robust sensing solutions that enable a new generation of automated applications across global markets.
